series_metadata.series_description: Cost allocation plans and related correspondence to and from the federalgovernment detailing operating expenditures of the agency.All active records identified as being needed by the Ohio Department of Medicaid (ODM) for their daily operations as of July 1, 2013, were transferred by the Ohio Department of Job and Family Services (ODJFS) to ODM. Any records that are inactive and identified as being not necessary for daily operations by ODM were retained by ODJFS.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Microform: in office ; Electronic: no longer of administrative value, and ; Paper: in office and 4 years in records center
retention_rules.disposition_method: Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
